query:
INSERT INTO knox_documents (category, platform, ecuFamily, yearRange, fileName, fileType, fileSize, description, extractedMetadata) VALUES
('definition', 'gm', 'T87A_10Speed', '2019-2024', '24293216_t87a.a2l', 'a2l', 46137344, 'GM T87A 10L80/10L90 TCM A2L - PN 24293216, Series_17, 44MB', 'TCM_T87A project. 10-speed trans tuning defs.'),
('calibration', 'gm', 'T87A_10Speed', '2019', '2019_10speed_24293216.bin', 'bin', 4194304, 'GM T87A 10-speed stock BIN - PN 24293216, 4MB', '2019 model year 10L80/10L90 stock calibration'),
('calibration', 'gm', 'T87A_10Speed', '2019-2024', 'T87A_FULLSTOCK_PATCHED.ols', 'ols', 0, 'T87A 10L80/10L90 PATCHED WinOLS - bench unlock verified by engineer', 'UNLOCKED/PATCHED. Full write access to 10-speed TCM.'),
('calibration', 'gm', 'T93_10L1000', '2020-2025', 'TCUT93_T93_Unlocked_v2.ols', 'ols', 0, 'T93 10L1000 UNLOCKED WinOLS - bench unlock verified by engineer', 'UNLOCKED. Allison 10L1000 full write access.'),
('definition', 'gm', 'C11_Allison6', '2011-2016', 'C11_25880958_AC_byAddr.txt', 'txt', 800000, 'C11 Allison 6-speed TCM address map - PN 25880958_AC, 16128 params', 'Address-sorted. Range 0x10000-0x3C8C2. ATCC/TCCC/TRNI/TRNS/VIOS/VVVE subsystems.'),
('definition', 'gm', 'C10_Allison6', '2006-2010', 'C10_120_byAddr.txt', 'txt', 800000, 'C10 Allison 6-speed TCM address map - 16055 params', 'Address-sorted. Range 0x10000-0x3B8FA. Same subsystems as C11, 133 param diff.');
